case.question: What is SENS Motion® - Connect?
case.gold_answer: SENS Motion® - Connect is an OEM Platform for medical sensors.

generated_answer: SENS Motion® - Connect is a web application that provides a platform for researchers to collect, manage, and analyze physical activity data from multiple participants simultaneously. It is part of the SENS motion sensor and patch system, which is designed to measure physical activity in research projects. The web application allows research staff to access the activity profiles of participants, download data for further processing and analysis, and utilize the data in large-scale research projects. The user manual for the SENS motion for Research provides information on what the system is, how to get started, and how to use the various features of the system. The documentation and support for the SENS motion® web application can be found at the provided link.
contexts:
Lead: Information about the SENS motion® sensor and patch system

This section contains support articles and documentation for the SENS motion® sensor and patch system

Lead: [](/support/web-application/sens-motion-webapp-39-release-notes)

## Background

Here you will find the user manual for Research. The Research manual is used for research projects where SENS is part of the project's outcome

It is recommended to read through the user manual before starting the project

## About SENS motion for Research

SENS motion for Research is designed to measure physical activity in research participants. Data can be collected on many participants at a time and can be used to advantage in large-scale projects. Research staff can access the activity profiles of participants and have the possibility to download data for data processing and analysis

You can watch a short video about SENS motion for Research here

## Contents of the user manual

The user manual for Research provides information about

**What is SENS Motion?**
**What is the SENS Motion system?**
**How do I get started?**
Sensor and sensor patch
Download and install the SENS motion app for smartphone
Using the online visualisation tool
**FAQ**
**Technical data**
**General information**

Image: SENS motion logo (source: /img/sens-motion-logo-black.png)

## Download user manual

[Download the SENS motion for Research user manual (PDF)](/files/PI-001-08-D01-DA-[v3.5]-brugermanual-SENS-motion-for-research.pdf)
